scripts.smoke:rig-fixture-bank: pnpm exec tsx src/characterGenerationCatFrontGate.smoke.ts && pnpm exec tsx src/characterGenerationCatThreeQuarterRepair.smoke.ts && pnpm exec tsx src/characterGenerationCanineHitlReview.smoke.ts && pnpm exec tsx src/characterGenerationHitlSelectionBlock.smoke.ts && pnpm exec tsx src/characterGenerationWolfFrontGate.smoke.ts
scripts.smoke:rig-fixture-bank:full: pnpm run smoke:rig-fixture-bank && pnpm exec tsx src/characterGenerationDogFrontScoring.smoke.ts && pnpm exec tsx src/characterGenerationCanineConsistencyDrift.smoke.ts && pnpm exec tsx src/characterGenerationThreeQuarterFrontMasterFloor.smoke.ts && pnpm exec tsx src/characterGenerationRepairTriageGate.smoke.ts && pnpm exec tsx src/characterGenerationPostRepairAcceptanceGate.smoke.ts && pnpm exec tsx src/characterGenerationStageInputPreflight.smoke.ts
scripts.smoke:env: dotenv -e ../../.env -o -- node -e "if(!process.env.DATABASE_URL||!process.env.REDIS_URL){throw new Error('Missing DATABASE_URL/REDIS_URL')} console.log('[worker] env smoke ok')"
